meta.title: The Distribution of Wealth in America Since 2016
meta.description:
Please join Hudson Institute for a conversation with Hudson Senior Fellow Dr. John Weicher and Dr. Edward Seiler, executive director of the Research Institute for Housing America and associate vice president for Housing Economics at the Mortgage Bankers Association, on Dr. Weicher’s report, “The Distribution of Wealth in America Since 2016.” Dr. Weicher’s research highlights changes in the distribution of wealth among American households between 2016 and 2019 and since the beginning of the COVID-19 pandemic in early 2020. Dr. Edward Seiler is an economist with over 20 years of experience in financial services.

Watch on Hudson.org: https://www.hudson.org/events/2079-virtual-event-the-distribution-of-wealth-in-america-since-201622022
